name: EdwEdwSumAuditDDelete

sqlReaderQuery.value: DELETE FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.SUM_AUDIT_D WHERE LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK < DATEADD(MONTH, -6, CAST(dbo.GetDateCST() AS DATE))
